gamma_A_vote_logit.model: OLS: logit(rem_against_pct) ~ asa_against + prior_year_pct + log_mkt_cap + gics_FE
gamma_A_vote_logit.notes: Vote-channel prior on additive logit scale. sigma = sqrt(SE^2 + (0.35*resid_sd)^2).

gamma_A_strike_logodds.model: BayesLogit(MAP+Laplace): first_strike ~ asa_against + prior_year_pct + log_mkt_cap + gics_FE; beta~N(0,2.5^2)
gamma_A_strike_logodds.notes: Strike-channel prior on log-odds scale from Bayesian logistic regression; Laplace approx for SE.

gamma_A_combined.model: Inverse-variance blend of vote-logit and strike-logodds priors
gamma_A_combined.notes: Combined prior blends two logit-scale effects (vote opposition and strike propensity).
